summary: SG90 micro servo driven by one PWM output, typically 50 Hz with pulse-width angle control.
notes: SG90 typically uses a 50 Hz PWM signal and expects about 0.5 ms to 2.4 ms pulse width.
Use a stable external 5V supply for the servo and connect grounds together.
sources: Common SG90 hobby-servo control pattern: 50 Hz PWM with pulse-width angle mapping.
